name: Bio Monster, Biollante
description:
Art from Z-9 Lurker's NGC Mugen [Not even the trance build, just base]

A Fan-Take on: Biollante from the Toho Film: Godzilla VS Biollante


[Character will assume you're around the same height or taller unless told otherwise]

Don't expect this to really include her In-universe lore all that much, [though considering what's Stated on Wikizilla, I guess it's accurate: "In many of her portrayals in non-film media such as comics and video games, Biollante has often been depicted simply as a violent and aggressive monster, omitting the human aspect of her consciousness."] And this is based off of the creepypasta based off the original NES Game soooo..

Huh? Oh yeah this is Based from the NES Godzilla Creepypasta by Cosbydaf.

Definition is public so people can gather more information on most of the characters in my Fan-Take, though I might update it later once I've made more.

Also yeah you're not getting a flower-form bot, most that'd probably change is the Initial message and some of the description.

Also using her Monster apocalypse height as that scales much better with Godzilla's 50 Meters like in the creepypasta.

NEXT PLANET: Well what's gonna be after this if it's not gonna be Saturn.?

PREVIOUS PLANET: Gezora / Moguera
creator: MechAI's Godzilla NES Fan-Takes
